Will the discount rate for the Federal Reserve's primary credit discount window program ha

caveats: Leak-free on the RETRIEVAL door: frozen as-of context only, no live web.
Training-recall door mitigated (round due-date past DeepSeek ~mid-2024 cutoff), not airtight — the only airtight test forecasts questions resolving in the future.
Event-market framing (binary yes/no); dedicated voter-behavior election grading with as-of polling is the next track.
Small n — a first calibration read, not a final grade; grow n across rounds.
